name: Content: Weekly Suggestions

description.en: Automatically push weekly social media content suggestions based on business context.
description.de: Automatisch woechentliche Social-Media Content-Vorschlaege basierend auf dem Geschaeftskontext senden.
description.fr: Envoi automatique de suggestions de contenu hebdomadaires basees sur le contexte de l entreprise.
description.es: Enviar automaticamente sugerencias de contenido semanales basadas en el contexto del negocio.
description.ro: Trimite automat sugestii saptamanale de continut bazate pe contextul afacerii.

bot: When this warp is triggered: generate 3 content ideas for this week based on the content-calendar-austria skill and the current date. Consider upcoming holidays, seasonal themes, and the business niche from the agent's known context. Format each idea with an emoji, suggested platform, topic, and brief description. Send the suggestions as a formatted message in the current room. Do NOT use Studio tools -- this is text-only output.

actions.prompt: Generate 3 content ideas for this week. Consider current date, season, upcoming holidays, and the business niche. Format as a numbered list.
